title: Big Oak Tree
description: This mod adds a brand-new Big Oak Tree to Forest & Flower Forest biome.
body:
Big Oak Tree Structure

This mod adds a brand-new Big Oak Tree to Forest & Flower Forest biome.
![Big Oak Tree Day](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4565b8e3ee47c571882df96970dc346ba4175f7.jpeg)

![Big Oak Tree Day](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/849063e233465e19cb6b8e413f056509a4feae3e.jpeg)
Big Oak Tree:

This mod adds a massive oak tree to your Minecraft world.
Perfect for players who love impressive natural landmarks or need a grand centerpiece for their builds.
You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
